mapper.select:
SELECT t1.id, t1.username, t1.tenant_name, t1.oci_region AS region, t1.tenant_create_time as createTime, t1.plan_type as planType, t1.proxy, t1.account_status as accountStatus, CASE WHEN MAX(t2.id) IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS enableCreate FROM oci_user t1 LEFT JOIN oci_create_task t2 ON t2.user_id = t1.id
AND t2.id IS NOT NULL
AND t2.id IS NULL
and (t1.username like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or t1.oci_region like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or t1.tenant_name like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
AND t1.plan_type = #{planType}
AND t1.account_status IS NULL
AND t1.account_status = #{accountStatus}
GROUP BY t1.id, t1.username,t1.tenant_name,t1.oci_region, t1.create_time, t1.proxy
order by t1.tenant_create_time ASC
order by t1.tenant_create_time DESC
order by t1.username DESC
limit #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t1.id) FROM oci_user t1 LEFT JOIN oci_create_task t2 ON t2.user_id = t1.id
AND t2.id IS NOT NULL
AND t2.id IS NULL
and (t1.username like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or t1.oci_region like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or t1.tenant_name like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
AND t1.plan_type = #{planType}
AND t1.account_status IS NULL
AND t1.account_status = #{accountStatus}
